mapper.select: select c.contest_id AS contestId, c.contest_name AS contestName, c.category AS category, c.group_levels AS groupLevels, c.cover_image AS coverImage, c.price AS price, c.enroll_start_time AS enrollStartTime, c.enroll_end_time AS enrollEndTime, c.event_start_time AS eventStartTime, c.event_end_time AS eventEndTime, ifnull(er.enroll_count, 0) AS enrollCount, c.audit_status AS auditStatus, null AS auditRemark, c.status AS status, c.partner_id AS partnerId, p.partner_name AS partnerName, null AS recommendTags from jst_contest c left join jst_event_partner p on p.partner_id = c.partner_id and p.del_flag = '0' left join ( select contest_id, count(1) AS enroll_count from jst_enroll_record where del_flag = '0' group by contest_id ) er on er.contest_id = c.contest_id where c.del_flag = '0' and c.audit_status = 'online' and c.enroll_end_time > now() order by enrollCount desc, c.enroll_end_time asc, c.contest_id desc limit #{limit}

select c.course_id AS courseId, c.course_name AS courseName, c.course_type AS courseType, c.cover_image AS coverImage, c.price AS price, c.points_price AS pointsPrice, null AS lessonCount, ifnull(l.learner_count, 0) AS learnerCount, c.creator_type AS creatorType, c.creator_id AS creatorId, c.audit_status AS auditStatus, c.status AS status, c.create_time AS createTime, c.update_time AS updateTime from jst_course c left join ( select course_id, count(1) AS learner_count from jst_course_learn_record where del_flag = '0' group by course_id ) l on l.course_id = c.course_id where c.del_flag = '0' and c.audit_status = 'approved' and c.status = 'on' order by learnerCount desc, c.update_time desc, c.course_id desc limit #{limit}

select null AS recommendTags, c.category AS category from jst_contest c where c.del_flag = '0' and c.audit_status = 'online' and c.enroll_end_time > now() order by c.update_time desc, c.contest_id desc limit #{limit}

select n.notice_id AS noticeId, n.title AS title, n.cover_image AS coverImage, n.content AS description, n.remark AS linkUrl, n.publish_time AS publishTime from jst_notice n where n.del_flag = '0' and n.status = 'published' and n.category = 'topic' order by n.top_flag desc, n.publish_time desc, n.notice_id desc limit #{limit}
